changelog:
Fork patches A3 — eliminate envelope artifacts the upstream model was flagging:
- Replaced <thinking_mode>...</thinking_mode> / <max_thinking_length>...</max_thinking_length> tags with plain prose so the model no longer fingerprints the proxy's thinking-mode cue as a synthetic harness signal.
- Stopped synthesizing the "Tool results:" prose preface in userInputMessage.content; structured tool results travel only via UserInputMessageContext.ToolResults (the field Kiro actually consumes).
- Replaced the multi-line claudeCodeBackendPrompt anti-injection guidance with a single neutral sentence; modern Claude has built-in protection against prompt injection so the proxy no longer re-instructs it (and no longer mimics a system-reminder).
- Removed the --- SYSTEM PROMPT --- / --- END SYSTEM PROMPT --- boundary markers entirely; the cleaned system prompt now sits at the top of the user content as plain preamble.
- Tightened isClaudeCodeSystemPrompt: replacement now requires at least one strong marker AND >= 3 total markers, preventing false positives on benign user prompts.

A2:
- docker-compose service / container_name renamed to kiro-go-patch.
- pull_policy: always added so docker compose up picks up the latest image.

A1:
- Prompt filter logic catches Claude Code 2.x <system-reminder> blocks, x-anthropic-billing-header, ## Environment / ## auto memory; applied to system prompt AND user messages.
- Response model field preserves the exact id sent by the client.
- /v1/models returns canonical Anthropic dashed/dated ids.
- New /v1/responses endpoint compatible with OpenAI Responses API (Codex CLI).
- Dashboard refresh: clear stat cards, restrained single-palette modern style.
